title: Packaging Designer for Beauty Products
brief: We are looking for a talented Packaging Designer to create premium, visually appealing packaging for our beauty and skincare product line. The ideal candidate has experience designing packaging for cosmetics, skincare, haircare, or wellness brands and understands how to create designs that feel modern, elegant, and retail-ready while maintaining strong brand consistency. Scope of Work Design labels and packaging for beauty products Create attractive front, back, and side panel layouts Develop typography, color palette, and visual hierarchy Ensure packaging is both aesthetically appealing and easy to read Prepare print-ready production files Requirements Proven experience in beauty, skincare, or cosmetic packaging Strong portfolio showcasing packaging and branding projects Proficiency in Adobe Illustrator and Photoshop Understanding of dielines, bleed, CMYK, and print production Strong attention to detail and communication skills Deliverables Final packaging design concepts Editable source files (AI/PSD) Print-ready PDF files High-resolution mockups (JPG/PNG) To Apply Please share: Relevant beauty or skincare packaging samples A brief introduction about your experience Estimated timeline for completion We are looking for a creative designer who can help build a premium brand presence and potentially collaborate on future product launches.
